name: Rozie Script Partial (JavaScript)
comment: A `.rzjs` script partial is plain JavaScript (NO SFC blocks) that uses Rozie $sigils — a slice of a component's <script> body lifted into its own file (PARTIAL_EXT = /\.(rzts|rzjs)$/ in packages/core/src/ir/inlineScriptPartials.ts). JS sibling of source.rozie.ts: embeds source.js; distinct $sigil coloring comes from the companion INJECTION grammar source.rozie.js.injection (rozie-js-sigils.injection.json).
